rows.notes: Top-of-page title is handwritten and partly cropped; letters read as 'Lista Scholari' but the following word is unclear. No monetary figures on this line.
Numbers at far right clearly read as '9 1 9' aligned in the £ s d columns. Description handwriting legible as 'Long Wittenham Div.'
Amount appears as '3 3 7' (pence '7' slightly smudged but consistent with digit shape). Description reads 'Taylors Five' though final letter could be an 's'.
Clear numeric '2 0 10' in the £ s d columns. 'Rymans do' (ditto) is legible in the description.
Amounts read cleanly as '2 12 7'. Description 'Barretts do' is clear.
Amount reads unambiguously as '2 0 0'. Description 'Hodges do' is clear.

Centered label 'Soluta Vona' (heading/summary). Right-hand amount aligns with the three column lines and matches the sum of the five preceding entries: 9 1 9 + 3 3 7 + 2 0 10 + 2 12 7 + 2 0 0 = £18 18s 9d. The pence column in image shows a figure close to '9' (some ink smudge) but arithmetic confirms 9d.

Description reads 'Subscription to Dr Kennicott'. Amount '8 8 0' clearly placed in columns.

Description reads 'Paviers Bill' (handwriting could be 'Pavier' or 'Pavior'); amount '8 1 6' visible though the tens-shillings digit is slightly faint.
Description 'Table Linen to Mr. Fletcher' is legible. Amount '6 6 0' is clearly written and aligned.

Large payment '200 0 0' clearly written in pounds column. Description 'Paid L. Wittenham Division' legible.

Reads 'Bible Clerk michells Benefaction'. Amount '2 10 0' clear. The proper name 'Michells' is somewhat uncertain but text is legible.

Description 'Committing Woman for stealing' readable; amount '0 9 0' clear.

Bottom-right grand total clearly written as '577 5 9' in the £ s d columns. Numerals are large and clear; alignment with column rules unambiguous.
